description:

description:

description:

description: The city of Hammond announced a development agreement for a proposed $7 billion data center project has expired. The agreement with Chicago-based developer Decennial was originally signed in June 2025 but has seen delays

title: Northern Indiana state forests now under Indiana State Parks control
description: Effective Wednesday, the nearly 900-acre Salamonie River State Forest near Lagro will be managed as part of Salamonie Lake, and the 515-acre Frances Slocum State Forest near Peru will be managed through Mississinewa Lake
